mapper.select: SELECT coupon_no AS couponNo, coupon_code AS couponCode, seller_no AS sellerNo, coupon_type AS couponType, coupon_name AS couponName, benefit_type AS benefitType, benefit_value AS benefitValue, min_order_price AS minOrderPrice, max_discount_price AS maxDiscountPrice, issue_limit AS issueLimit, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, caution, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM coupon ORDER BY coupon_no DESC

SELECT coupon_no AS couponNo, coupon_code AS couponCode, seller_no AS sellerNo, coupon_type AS couponType, coupon_name AS couponName, benefit_type AS benefitType, benefit_value AS benefitValue, min_order_price AS minOrderPrice, max_discount_price AS maxDiscountPrice, issue_limit AS issueLimit, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, caution, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM coupon WHERE coupon_no=#{couponNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon(coupon_code, seller_no, coupon_type, coupon_name, benefit_type, benefit_value, min_order_price, max_discount_price, issue_limit, start_date, end_date, caution, status, reg_date) VALUES(#{couponCode}, #{sellerNo}, #{couponType}, #{couponName}, #{benefitType}, #{benefitValue}, #{minOrderPrice}, #{maxDiscountPrice}, #{issueLimit}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{caution}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), NOW())
